mapper.sql: case when t.audit_date is not null and time(cast(t.audit_date as datetime)) > '00:00:00' then cast(t.audit_date as datetime) else t.create_time end

from his_mirror_consume_link l inner join gz_traceability t on t.id = l.traceability_id and t.tenant_id = l.tenant_id and ifnull(t.del_flag, 0) = 0 and t.trace_source = 'HIS_MIRROR_HIGH' and t.order_status = 2 inner join gz_traceability_entry te on te.id = l.traceability_entry_id and te.tenant_id = l.tenant_id and ifnull(te.del_flag, 0) = 0 left join fd_department d on d.id = t.exec_dept_id left join fd_supplier sup on sup.id = te.supplier_id and sup.tenant_id = l.tenant_id left join gz_high_consume_confirm c on c.id = l.confirm_id and c.tenant_id = l.tenant_id left join gz_high_consume_confirm_bill in_bill on in_bill.confirm_id = l.confirm_id and in_bill.tenant_id = l.tenant_id and in_bill.bill_type = 101 and ifnull(in_bill.del_flag, 0) = 0 and in_bill.supplier_id = cast(te.supplier_id as char) left join gz_high_consume_confirm_bill out_bill on out_bill.confirm_id = l.confirm_id and out_bill.tenant_id = l.tenant_id and out_bill.bill_type = 201 and ifnull(out_bill.del_flag, 0) = 0 and out_bill.supplier_id = cast(te.supplier_id as char) left join his_inpatient_charge_mirror inp on l.visit_kind = 'INPATIENT' and inp.id = l.mirror_row_id and inp.tenant_id = l.tenant_id left join his_outpatient_charge_mirror outp on l.visit_kind = 'OUTPATIENT' and outp.id = l.mirror_row_id and outp.tenant_id = l.tenant_id where l.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and ifnull(l.del_flag, 0) = 0 and l.gz_dep_inventory_id is not null and l.traceability_id is not null
mapper.select:
select l.id as linkId, l.visit_kind as visitKind, l.mirror_row_id as mirrorRowId, l.alloc_qty as allocQty, l.dept_batch_consume_entry_id as deptBatchConsumeEntryId, ifnull(l.confirm_status, 0) as confirmStatus, t.create_time as consumeCreateTime, cast(t.audit_date as datetime) as consumeAuditDate, () as consumeAuditTime, te.id as consumeEntryId, te.material_id as materialId, te.material_name as materialName, te.charge_price as unitPrice, coalesce(l.alloc_qty, te.quantity) as entryQty, case when te.charge_price is not null and coalesce(l.alloc_qty, te.quantity) is not null then te.charge_price * coalesce(l.alloc_qty, te.quantity) else null end as amt, cast(te.supplier_id as char) as supplierId, sup.name as supplierName, te.batch_no as batchNo, null as batchNumber, null as beginTime, te.expiry_date as endTime, te.master_barcode as mainBarcode, te.secondary_barcode as subBarcode, te.specification as materialSpeci, te.model as materialModel, null as factoryId, t.exec_dept_id as departmentId from his_mirror_consume_link l inner join gz_traceability t on t.id = l.traceability_id and t.tenant_id = l.tenant_id and ifnull(t.del_flag, 0) = 0 and t.trace_source = 'HIS_MIRROR_HIGH' and t.order_status = 2 inner join gz_traceability_entry te on te.id = l.traceability_entry_id and te.tenant_id = l.tenant_id and ifnull(te.del_flag, 0) = 0 left join fd_supplier sup on sup.id = te.supplier_id and sup.tenant_id = l.tenant_id where l.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and ifnull(l.del_flag, 0) = 0 and l.gz_dep_inventory_id is not null and l.traceability_id is not null and l.id in
#{id}
mapper.insert:
insert into gz_high_consume_confirm_line ( id, tenant_id, confirm_id, consume_link_id, dept_batch_consume_entry_id, traceability_entry_id, del_flag, create_time ) values
(#{e.id}, #{e.tenantId}, #{e.confirmId}, #{e.consumeLinkId}, #{e.deptBatchConsumeEntryId}, #{e.traceabilityEntryId}, ifnull(#{e.delFlag}, 0), #{e.createTime})

insert into gz_high_consume_confirm_bill ( id, tenant_id, confirm_id, supplier_id, bill_type, stk_io_bill_id, bill_no, del_flag, create_time ) values
(#{e.id}, #{e.tenantId}, #{e.confirmId}, #{e.supplierId}, #{e.billType}, #{e.stkIoBillId}, #{e.billNo}, ifnull(#{e.delFlag}, 0), #{e.createTime})
mapper.update:
update his_mirror_consume_link set confirm_status = 1, confirm_id = #{confirmId}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now() where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and ifnull(del_flag, 0) = 0 and ifnull(confirm_status, 0) = 0 and id in
#{id}
mapper.select: select max(confirm_no) from gz_high_consume_confirm where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and confirm_no like concat(#{datePrefix}, '%') and ifnull(del_flag, 0) = 0

select id, tenant_id as tenantId, confirm_id as confirmId, supplier_id as supplierId, bill_type as billType, stk_io_bill_id as stkIoBillId, bill_no as billNo from gz_high_consume_confirm_bill where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and confirm_id = #{confirmId} and ifnull(del_flag, 0) = 0 order by supplier_id, bill_type
